name: kungfuwiki
description: Some documentation on Kung Fu forms

scripts.build: tsc && cd dist && node src/main.js && cp -r ../static/* ./out/
scripts.dev-server: nodemon --exec "tsc && cd dist && node src/main.js && ln -sf --no-dereference ../../static/images ./out/images && ln -sf --no-dereference ../../static/videos ./out/videos && cd dist/out && python3 -m http.server"
scripts.dev-server-win: nodemon --exec "npm run build && npx serve dist/out/"

author: Amir Czwink
